## Description
<!-- Please include a summary of the change and which issue is fixed. -->
<!-- Describe the motivation and context for this change. -->

Fixes # (issue)

## Type of change
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Performance / SEO / Accessibility optimization

## Checklist:
- [ ] I have run `npm run format` (Biome) on my code.
- [ ] I have verified `npx tsc --noEmit` passes.
- [ ] My changes generate no new React hydration errors.
- [ ] I have run the Playwright smoke tests (`npm run test:smoke`).
- [ ] My code follows the WCAG 2.2 accessibility guidelines.
- [ ] Any new env variables have been added to `.env.example`.
